app.name: BuildingLens
app.tagline: Inspection reports and public data, turned into a building risk view.

common.mockNotice: No API key detected: answers run in mock mode. Add a key to .env for real answers.

provider.label: AI provider
provider.mockTooltip: Running in mock mode: answers are generated locally without an API key.

footer.tagline: BuildingLens turns public construction data into a building risk view.

search.title: Ask the portfolio
search.subtitle: Ask a question in plain language. The answer is grounded in the inspection reports and cites its sources.
search.placeholder: Ask a question about the buildings...
search.groundedNote: Answers are grounded in the inspection reports and cite the passages they used.
search.noAnswer: No answer yet. Type a question above or pick an example.
exampleList: Which buildings have critical fire-safety defects?
What are the structural defects in the highest-risk building?
Summarise the roofing problems across the portfolio

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: All buildings ranked by risk score, with defect counts.
portfolio.name: Name

tips.buildings: Total buildings in the portfolio, ingested from EUBUCCO Luxembourg open data.
tips.totalDefects: All defects extracted from the inspection reports across every building.
tips.criticalDefects: Defects rated critical: an immediate safety or structural concern.
tips.riskChart: Risk score per building, highest first. The score combines how many defects a building has with how severe they are.

building.noCoordinates: No public coordinates available for this building.

tips.riskScore: Risk score from 0 to 100. It weighs critical defects most, then major, then minor, on a saturating curve so a building can approach but never exceed 100.
tips.critical: Critical: an immediate risk to safety or structural integrity. Address without delay.
tips.major: Major: a significant defect that needs planned remediation.
tips.minor: Minor: a cosmetic or low-impact issue to monitor.
tips.byDiscipline: How the defects split across building disciplines such as structure, roofing or building services.
tips.bySeverity: The share of defects at each severity rating.
tips.defectList: Every defect extracted from the inspection report, each with the sentence it came from. Use the filters to focus on a severity.
tips.downloads: Generate a client-ready report with the executive summary and the full defect table. Excel keeps the table interactive; PDF is print-ready.
tips.askAbout: Ask in plain language. The answer is grounded only in this building's report and cites the passages it used.
tips.map: Approximate position of the building in Luxembourg, from its public coordinates.
